name: resume-adaptation-llm
description: LLM-native resume adaptation skill - delegates all processing to Claude
system_prompt: You are an expert career coach and professional resume writer. Your task is to analyze resumes and job descriptions, then produce tailored application materials. You excel at understanding candidate experience, extracting job requirements, and crafting compelling narratives that match candidates to opportunities.

steps.name: fetch_inputs
steps.description: Read resume file and fetch job description (URL or file)

steps.name: analyze_and_tailor
steps.description: Claude analyzes resume, extracts job requirements, tailors content, generates ATS analysis and cover letter

steps.name: output_results
steps.description: Write tailored resume and cover letter to output files
